testcase.name: test_anonymous_cannot_list
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_quotations.py:83: in test_anonymous_cannot_list assert r.status_code in (401, 403), r.text E AssertionError: {"items":[{"id":"badb039a-6801-4ad6-a420-70d0cdce5a5c","number":"QT-2026-0001","customerId":null,"customerName":"Test Co","customerEmail":"test@example.com","customerPhone":"","shippingAddress":null,"items":[{"productId":null,"name":"Cold-pressed oil","description":"","qty":5,"unit":"Litre","price":250,"total":1250}],"subtotal":1250,"taxRate":5,"tax":62.5,"shipping":50,"discount":0,"total":1362.5,"notes":"Bulk order","validUntil":null,"status":"converted","convertedToOrderId":"DAMQTGJPO6871B","createdBy":{"id":"600eac72-1f19-49ae-8299-d283c5631329","name":"Aadhvika Admin"},"createdAt":"2026-06-25T12:07:40.055Z","updatedAt":"2026-06-25T12:07:43.542Z","history":[{"status":"draft","at":"2026-06-25T12:07:40.055Z","by":"Aadhvika Admin","note":"Quote created"},{"status":"sent","at":"2026-06-25T12:07:43.505Z","by":"Aadhvika Admin","note":"Emailed to customer"},{"status":"accepted","at":"2026-06-25T12:07:43.525Z","by":"Aadhvika Admin","note":""},{"status":"converted","at":"2026-06-25T12:07:43.542Z","by":"Aadhvika Admin","note":"Converted to order DAMQTGJPO6871B"}],"sentAt":"2026-06-25T12:07:43.505Z"}]} E assert 200 in (401, 403) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_user_cannot_list
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_quotations.py:47: in user _login(s, USER_EMAIL, USER_PASS) backend/tests/test_quotations.py:31: in _login assert r.status_code == 200, f"login failed {email}: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: login failed user@dhara.com: 401 {"error":"invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_user_cannot_create
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_quotations.py:47: in user _login(s, USER_EMAIL, USER_PASS) backend/tests/test_quotations.py:31: in _login assert r.status_code == 200, f"login failed {email}: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: login failed user@dhara.com: 401 {"error":"invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
